---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Keep ferrobucket's scope in mind — it targets local
development and homelab use, not production/distributed storage.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references to AWS S3 behaviour, or examples.
